name: N Brown Group plc
description: N Brown Group plc is a UK-based digital fashion and homeware retailer. The company operates through several well-known brands, including JD Williams, Simply Be, and Jacamo, offering a wide range of clothing, footwear, and home products. With a strong focus on inclusivity and fit, N Brown provides customers with flexible payment options through its financial services division, catering to underserved customer groups in the digital retail market.
